2605.01278.title: Valley3: Scaling Omni Foundation Models for E-commerce
2605.01278.paper_summary: In this work, we present Valley3, an omni multimodal large language model (MLLM) developed for diverse global e-commerce tasks, with unified understanding and reasoning capabilities across text, images, video, and audio. A key feature of Valley3 is its native multilingual audio capability for e-commerce, developed by extending vision-language models to better support crucial audio-visual tasks, particularly in short-video scenarios. To achieve this, we carefully design a four-stage omni e-commerce continued pre-training pipeline, through which Valley3 progressively acquires audio understanding, cross-modal instruction-following, e-commerce domain knowledge, and long-context reasoning capabilities, ultimately evolving into an omni model for diverse e-commerce scenarios. Then, we further improve Valley3 through post-training to encourage long-chain reasoning with controllable reasoning modes, enabling one non-thinking mode and three distinct levels of thinking, thereby balancing inference efficiency in simple scenarios with deep reasoning for complex applications. Moreover, we equip Valley3 with agentic search capabilities to proactively invoke search tools and acquire task-relevant information for e-commerce deep research tasks. To comprehensively assess the capabilities of Valley3, we construct an omni e-commerce benchmark spanning 6 tasks. Experimental results show that Valley3 consistently outperforms strong baselines on our in-house and open-source e-commerce benchmarks, while remaining competitive on general-domain benchmarks.
2605.01278.paper_summary_zh: 在這項工作中，我們介紹了 Valley3，這是一個為多樣化全球電子商務任務開發的全方位多模態大型語言模型 (MLLM)，具備跨文本、圖像、視頻和音頻的統一理解和推理能力。 Valley3 的一個主要特點是其原生多語言音頻能力，這是通過擴展視覺-語言模型來更好地支持關鍵的音頻-視覺任務，特別是在短視頻場景中而開發的。為了實現這一目標，我們精心設計了一個四階段的全方位電子商務持續預訓練流程，通過該流程，Valley3 逐步獲得音頻理解、跨模態指令跟隨、電子商務領域知識和長上下文推理能力，最終演變為一個適用於多樣化電子商務場景的全方位模型。然後，我們進一步通過後訓練來改善 Valley3，以促進可控推理模式下的長鏈推理，使其能夠實現一種非思考模式和三個不同層次的思考，從而在簡單場景中平衡推理效率與在複雜應用中的深度推理。此外，我們為 Valley3 裝備了主動搜索能力，以主動調用搜索工具並獲取與任務相關的信息，用於電子商務深度研究任務。為了全面評估 Valley3 的能力，我們構建了一個涵蓋 6 個任務的全方位電子商務基準。實驗結果顯示，Valley3 在我們的內部和開源電子商務基準上始終超越強基準，同時在通用領域基準上保持競爭力。
2605.01278.author: Zeyu Chen et.al.
2605.01278.authors: Zeyu Chen, Guanghao Zhou, Qixiang Yin, Ziwang Zhao, Huanjin Yao, Pengjiu Xia, Min Yang, Cen Chen, Minghui Qiu
